Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel A Neurological Examination Of The Plaintiff With Dr. Steven Mcintire; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration. Request For Monetary Sanctions As Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff'S Counsel In The Amount Of $1,060.
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. ASHWIN LADVA, Esq. of Ladva Law Firm (tel: 415-296-8844) for Plaintiff.
Atty. MATT JEDRZEJEK, Esq. of Messner Reeves LLP (tel: 949-612-9128) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT YVES BEHAR's Motion To Compel A Neurological Examination Of The Plaintiff With Dr. Steven Mcintire; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration. Request For Monetary Sanctions As Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff'S Counsel In The Amount Of $1,060.

The Court directs counsel to appear on the discovery calendar. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard on the court's discovery calendar at 9:00 a.m. on the same date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL A NEUROLOGICAL EXAMINATION OF THE PLAINTIFF WITH DR. STEVEN MCINTIRE; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION. REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,060. (ADDED FOR POSTING OF TENTATIVE RULING)
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Off Calendar

DEFENDANT YVES BEHARN'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL A NEUROLOGICAL EXAMINATION OF THE PLAINTIFF WITH DR. STEVEN MCINTIRE; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION. REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,060.
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT YVES BEHARN'S MOTION TO COMPEL A NEUROLOGICAL EXAMINATION OF THE PLAINTIFF WITH DR. STEVEN MCINTIRE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT YVES BEHAR'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "BEHAR) MOTION TO COMPEL A NEUROLOGICAL EXAMINATION OF PLAINTIFF ROBERT ARANA (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "ARANA") WITH Dr. STEVEN MCINTIRE AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,060.00 IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART AS FOLLOWS:
(1) WITHIN THIRTY CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL SUBMIT TO THE DEMAND FOR PHYSICAL EXAMINATION BY STEVEM MCINTIRE, M.D. AS SET FORTH IN THE DEMAND PREVIOUSLY SERVED UPON PLAINTIFF ON MARCH 19, 2024. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION AS TO THE SCOPE OF THE EXAMINATION ARE OVERRULED.
(2) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AS AGAINST EITHER PARTY TO THIS LITIGATION.

COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR AGREEMENT AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING ON APRIL 30, 2024 REGARDLESS WHETHER APPROVAL AS TO FORM HAS BEEN RECEIVED.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Further Responses To First Set Of Request For Production
Off Calendar Oct-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Scott Nakama, Esq. 415-296-8844 Ladva Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Aaron Soleimani, Esq. 949-612-9128 Messner Reeves LLP for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Argued. Mr. Soleimani argues privacy rights outweigh the need for documents and that sanctions are not merited since parites met in good faith Mr. Nakama responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROBERT ARANA's Motion To Compel Defendants Further Responses To First Set Of Request For Production.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

***Order is signed, after the hearing.***

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Set For Trial On Jun-03-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
